name: mk-qa-master
description: AI 測試大師 — stable v1.0 QA testing agent skill. Drives mk-qa-master's 21-tool MCP surface (pytest / Jest / Cypress / Maestro / Schemathesis / Newman) plus the AI Visual Challenge Solver, OWASP API Security scanner, and universal plan + verify bookend on 5 core tools. Auto-activates from prompts like 'run my tests', 'why did this test fail', 'generate tests for this URL', 'scan this API for OWASP issues'.

interface.shortDescription: QA testing skill — runs, generates, debugs tests + OWASP API scanner
interface.longDescription: Single-file agent skill backed by mk-qa-master's MCP server. Surfaces 5 flows: run tests, generate tests from URL/mobile, debug failures, solve CAPTCHAs, scan APIs for OWASP API Top 10. Same skill folder loads in Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, and Hermes via the agentskills.io convention.
